<ITEM>
  <TEXT>11. Bey Herrn Daniel Hag dem Buchbinder sind folgende Bccher, in nachgesetztem Preie zu verkauffen;</TEXT>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Justi Lipsii</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Epistolarum Centuriae complet</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT>
    <PUBLISHER>apud Plautin.</PUBLISHER>
    <PRICE>1. Gulden 36. xr.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>

  </BIBL>

    <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT>

  </BIBL>

    <TITLE>de Militia Romana cum An. fig.</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
    <PUBLISHER>ibid.</PUBLISHER>

  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Poliorecticon de Machinis, Tormentis, Telis cum An.fig.</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT>
    <PRICE>fl. 1. xr. 12.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>de Amphitheatro</TITLE>
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>de Amphitheatris extra Romam, cum An.fig.</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
      <PUBLISHER>ibid.</PUBLISHER>
      <PRICE>30. xr.</PRICE>
    </BIBL>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Dissert. apud Principes Se C.Plinii Pane- Gyricus cum Commentar.</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
    <PUBLISHER>ibid.</PUBLISHER>
    <PRICE>48. xr.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>C. Corn. Taciti & Velleji Paterculi</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Opera cum Lipsii Commentariis</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT>
    <PUBLISHER>ibid.</PUBLISHER>
    <PRICE>fl. 3.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Opera cum Notis Integris W. Heinsii & variorum</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
    <VOLUME>3. Theil</VOLUME>
    <PLACE>Lugd.</PLACE>
    <PRICE>fl. 7. xr. 12.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Gotthard Heideggers</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Kleinere Teutsche Schrifften</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1732.</YEAR>
    <PRICE>30. xr.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Delicia Urbis Bernae</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1732.</YEAR>
    <PRICE>13. .</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>J. J. Scheuchzers</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Vernunfft-mige Undersuchung des Baades zu Baaden, mit Kupfferen</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1732.</YEAR>
    <PRICE>11..</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>J. J. Scheuchzers</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Vernunfft-mige Undersuchung des Baades zu Baaden, ohne Kupffer</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1732.</YEAR>
    <PRICE>4. Batzen.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Johann Milton</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Verlust des Parabieses</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1732.</YEAR>
    <PRICE>14. .</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Paragone della Pobsia Tragica dtalia conquella di Francia</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1732.</YEAR>
    <PRICE>5. Batzen.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>J. J. Breitingeri</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>in Versus obscurciss. Persii diarribe Historico Literaria</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1723.</YEAR>
    <PRICE>1. Batzen.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Discurse der Mahleren</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>4. Theil</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1731.</YEAR>
    <PRICE>16. .</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":15,"explanation":"The XML had several issues including incorrect tags, missing tags, and improperly nested elements. I added missing tags, corrected improperly nested elements, and ensured all elements are properly closed."}
